_schemaVersionSource: src/features/business-dna/schemas/business-dna-profile.schema.ts → BUSINESS_DNA_PROFILE_SCHEMA_VERSION — keep this value in sync; validate-packages.ts checks it.
_businessCountNote: Counts only packages with metadata.status === "published". ai-automation-agency is status "template" — a placeholder structure, not a registered business — so it contributes 0. The 4 Professional Services packages below (accounting-firm, financial-consultancy, insurance-brokerage, tax-consultancy) are all status "published", contributing 4. See business-library/technology/PROFESSIONAL-SERVICES-INDUSTRY-REPORT.md for why only these 4 of the original 8 candidate businesses were authored.
